ValidationRule.description: prevents users from editing C/W Opp
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(IsPickVal(PriorValue(StageName),"Closed Won"), OR($Profile.Name !="System Administrator", $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps")) && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot update a closed won opportunity. Please contact an administrator for assistance.
